title: New Paper Published in JCIS
summary: Our paper 'AoA Estimation in Dual-Polarization Virtual Sub-Arrays for Analog Beam Refinement' was published in the Journal of Communication and Information Systems.

title: Paper Accepted at IEEE TVT
summary: The work 'Network Performance Evaluation of a Sub-THz Downlink System Operating Under Dynamic DTX' has been published in the prestigious IEEE Transactions on Vehicular Technology.

title: Publication on Interference Mitigation
summary: The paper 'Interference Mitigation for Dynamic TDD Networks Employing Sounding Signals' was published in the Journal of Communication and Information Systems.
